lines.speaker: Brikka
lines.text: Hello there, human. Welcome to my humble little inn. Perfect place to have a nice relax after a hard day in the mines. Can I get you anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you get many customers here?

lines.speaker: Brikka
lines.text: Oh yes, very much so. We're one of the only stop-offs on long journeys from east to west. Plenty of sailors like to have a little break here.

lines.speaker: Brikka
lines.text: Then of course you have the workers here. It often feels like they yearn for the mines, but I've thankfully just about managed to teach them to take care of themselves from time to time as well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds like they're lucky to have you.

lines.speaker: Brikka
lines.text: Oh they very much are! Korgan may be the one paying them and keeping them well equipped, but make no mistake, it's me and my stews that are keeping them alive!

lines.speaker: Brikka
lines.text: Speaking of which, I can sort you out with a stew yourself if you want? Or maybe you'd prefer a drink?
